title: JAIL INFORMATION - 211info
text: JOSEPHINE COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE JAIL INFORMATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Operates correctional facilities for adults in custody. Assists families in locating an adult in custody within the corrections system. Provides in-person and video visitation opportunities for adults in custody and visitors. Processes bail and commissary transactions. 1901 NE F Street Grants Pass, OR 97526 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 474-5123 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 474-5123 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Josephine County Services: County Correctional Facilities Prisoner Locator Services Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - SHERIFF'S OFFICE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. JOSEPHINE COUNTY SHERIFF'S OFFICE
